checks.name: Structured review JSON
checks.evidence: DesignReviewerAgent outputs task_id, status, decision, checks, blocking_issues, non_blocking_issues and reviewed_artifacts.

checks.name: Reads required artifacts
checks.evidence: Agent reads workspace/tasks/{task_id}/analysis/project_context.yaml, architecture/mvp_architecture.md and design/mvp_system_design.yaml by default.

checks.name: Blocking issue stops orchestration
checks.evidence: scripts/run_local_task.py stops with status blocked_by_design_review when design_review output contains blocking_issues.

checks.name: Pass and block tests
checks.evidence: tests/test_design_reviewer_agent.py and tests/test_run_local_task.py cover passing and blocking review paths.

checks.name: Target effect demo tracked
checks.evidence: docs/demos/ai_dev_pipeline_demo.html is included and linked from README.md.

non_blocking_notes: dev-005 should add a coder Agent skeleton that reads dev task scope and produces a structured implementation plan.
